category_sources: source_facts.description says Plugin and runtime library for using protobuf with Swift; official README describes generating Swift code from .proto files.
display_name_sources: official repository README heading is Swift Protobuf; source_facts.name is swift-protobuf.
docs_sources: official repository README provides build and usage instructions and links detailed Plugin documentation; repository has an official Documentation directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/apple/swift-protobuf; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies protobuf support for Swift; official README covers protoc-gen-swift, SwiftProtobuf runtime library, and Protocol Buffer serialization.
